accepted_failure.why_correct: The fixture-only provider emitted load-time session/update frames before the session/load response, but the then-current Conduit WebSocket snapshot did not expose a loaded transcript read model.

rejected_false_start.why_rejected: The candidate root was relative to the service process working directory, so this did not prove the load replay contract failure.

post_fix_guard.requirement: The replay fake provider emits session/update frames during session/load before its load response, and session/prompt succeeds only after matching the stored loaded replay variants and neutral text markers.

hygiene: sanitized; no raw session ids, private prompts, local paths, auth metadata, or raw provider captures
